architecture.description: Architecture planning role for ownership boundaries, integration risks, and hard-to-reverse decisions.

auth.description: Identity and authorization planning role for principals, permissions, and trust boundaries.

security.description: Security planning role for threat models, abuse cases, and required gates.

data-models.description: Data modeling role for entities, state transitions, and migration risks.

scaling.description: Scaling role for capacity assumptions, bottlenecks, and degradation plans.

product-semantics.description: Product semantics role for workflow fit, success criteria, and scope drift.

rollup-editor.description: Planning rollup role that merges specialist outputs into one plan and evidence document.

implementation.description: Work-item implementation role for scoped code, docs, or config changes.

semantic-alignment.description: Work-item semantic alignment role for plan fit and product intent.

evidence-rollup.description: Work-item rollup role that combines implementation, test, review, and semantic evidence.

security-review.description: Review gate role for trust boundaries, abuse cases, and security gate status.

semantic-review.description: Review gate role for plan alignment, scope drift, and user intent questions.

review-rollup.description: Review rollup role that turns code, security, and semantic review outputs into a decision.

local-validation.description: Validation role for local commands, results, and artifacts.

deployed-validation.description: Validation role for deployed checks, manual gates, and environment limits.

validation-rollup.description: Validation rollup role that summarizes proven, waived, and remaining verification gaps.
